name: Date Picker
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Date Picker wrapper around @foldkit/ui DatePicker and Calendar, with single-date selection, popover focus choreography, hidden ISO form values, min/max constraints, ISO input composition, RTL rendering, and deterministic live examples.

registry.reason: Date Picker trigger and calendar controls use local shadcn button styling affordances.
Date Picker calendar presentation follows the local shadcn Calendar base-nova class tokens while using the native Foldkit Calendar model.
DOB and input examples compose local Field labels and descriptions.
Input example composes local shadcn Input classes for ISO date entry.
Input example mirrors origin input-group composition with a date picker trigger.
The native Foldkit DatePicker owns a Popover submodel and uses shadcn popover surface tokens.
Date Picker uses local class canonicalization and Tailwind conflict handling.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, messages, commands, and native Calendar date primitives.
Provides the native DatePicker, Calendar, and Popover submodels used by the wrapper.
Provides Schema, Option, Match, and parsing helpers.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin runtime is replaced by native Foldkit Calendar and DatePicker submodels.
Date formatting and arithmetic use native Foldkit Calendar helpers.
Locale examples use native Foldkit Calendar locale data.
Locale examples use native Foldkit Calendar locale data.
Installable source uses local inline SVG icons.
Origin RTL language selector is replaced by deterministic local RTL data.
Natural-language parsing is deferred until a native Foldkit model exists for that behavior.

examples.title: DatePickerDemo
examples.description: Default shadcn-style trigger backed by native Foldkit DatePicker and Calendar submodels.

examples.title: DatePickerBasic
examples.description: Minimal placeholder date picker with deterministic native CalendarDate state.

examples.title: DatePickerDob
examples.description: Birthdate picker using native minDate and maxDate constraints.

examples.title: DatePickerInput
examples.description: ISO input composition that decodes YYYY-MM-DD values through Calendar.CalendarDateFromIsoString.

examples.title: DatePickerRtl
examples.description: RTL Date Picker using local direction and native Foldkit Calendar locale data.

deviations.summary: No primary base-nova Date Picker component source exists; implementation is grounded in docs, examples, and public registry fixture evidence.
deviations.rationale: The origin repository does not provide a reusable base-nova date-picker.tsx source file for this row.

deviations.summary: Date Picker wraps native @foldkit/ui DatePicker and Calendar.CalendarDate instead of React DayPicker, date-fns, and React state.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must preserve native submodel state, command mapping, and Effect Schema date boundaries.

deviations.summary: Trigger and navigation icons use local inline SVG helpers instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react.

deviations.summary: Range, time, and natural-language parsing examples are deferred.
deviations.rationale: The native Foldkit DatePicker in this package exposes single-date selection. Range, time composition, and natural-language parsing need their own native models.
